_comment: Pa11y configuration for WCAG 2.2 AAA testing.
The setup-phase blanket ignores for G17, G18, and G141 have been removed as
of the a11y/remediation pull request — all items from todo.md are now fixed.
Documented exceptions that remain after remediation:
ACC-LLBS-001: #156082 on white = 6.94:1, marginally below 7:1 AAA.
Affects: nav link hover state, stat-card border-top (decorative),
timeline-bar (decorative). Pa11y may still flag these; Carol to
Mission card (vmv-card--dark): Pa11y reports 1.09:1 on .vmv-card__text but
the actual computed colour is white (#fff) on #042433 (high
contrast). Believed to be a Pa11y false positive caused by CSS
custom-property inheritance not being resolved correctly. Carol
to confirm with axe-core, which resolves custom properties more
ACC-LLBS-002: Canvas keyboard gap — Phase 2, out of scope here.
